message:
feat(lipgloss): Add per-side border color methods

Add individual border foreground/background color setter methods:

- border_top_foreground(), border_right_foreground(), etc.
- border_top_background(), border_right_background(), etc.

These complement the existing border_foreground() and border_background()
methods that set all sides at once, providing finer control over
border styling.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
